message:
Command `export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"

PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
GEN_CONFIG="/tmp/soc_config_gen.yaml"
PDK_ROOT="/nc/apps/pdk"
NC_LIB_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/ip"

# Core dimensions: 6x6 arrangement requires W=3407.2, H=2920.6
# Use 3500x3000 for safety margin
CORE_WIDTH=3500
CORE_HEIGHT=3000

echo "=== Executing nc_chipgen generate (with explicit core dimensions) ==="
echo ""
echo "Full command:"
echo "  nc_chipgen \\"
echo "    --soc-config \"$GEN_CONFIG\" \\"
echo "    --out         \"$PROJECT_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --pdk-root    \"$PDK_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --nc-lib-root \"$NC_LIB_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --core-width  $CORE_WIDTH \\"
echo "    --core-height $CORE_HEIGHT"
echo ""

nc_chipgen \
    --soc-config "$GEN_CONFIG" \
    --out         "$PROJECT_ROOT" \
    --pdk-root    "$PDK_ROOT" \
    --nc-lib-root "$NC_LIB_ROOT" \
    --core-width  $CORE_WIDTH \
    --core-height $CORE_HEIGHT 2>&1

RETCODE=$?
echo ""
echo "=== nc_chipgen exited with code: $RETCODE ==="` executed with exit code 0.

echo "=== Executing nc_chipgen generate (with explicit core dimensions) ==="

function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== Executing nc_chipgen generate (with explicit core dimensions) ===

Full command:
  nc_chipgen \
    --soc-config "/tmp/soc_config_gen.yaml" \
    --out         "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526" \
    --pdk-root    "/nc/apps/pdk" \
    --nc-lib-root "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip" \
    --core-width  3500 \
    --core-height 3000

Error: Cannot fit 32 CF_SRAM_1024x32 macros (387.87×306.775 µm) with 200.0 µm gap in core area 2728.7×2228.7 µm
[1/8] Running NC_SOCGEN for mspm33c321a_derivative...
[2/8] Generating padframe configuration...
[3/8] Using manual core area: 3500.0 x 3000.0 µm
[4/8] Updating padframe config with core dimensions...
[5/8] Running padframe-gen...
[6/8] Generating wrapper RTL...
[7/8] Generating chip top-level RTL...
[8/8] Generating OpenLane hardening configs...

=== nc_chipgen exited with code: 1 ===

extras.command:
export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"

PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
GEN_CONFIG="/tmp/soc_config_gen.yaml"
PDK_ROOT="/nc/apps/pdk"
NC_LIB_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/ip"

# Core dimensions: 6x6 arrangement requires W=3407.2, H=2920.6
# Use 3500x3000 for safety margin
CORE_WIDTH=3500
CORE_HEIGHT=3000

echo "=== Executing nc_chipgen generate (with explicit core dimensions) ==="
echo ""
echo "Full command:"
echo "  nc_chipgen \\"
echo "    --soc-config \"$GEN_CONFIG\" \\"
echo "    --out         \"$PROJECT_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --pdk-root    \"$PDK_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --nc-lib-root \"$NC_LIB_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --core-width  $CORE_WIDTH \\"
echo "    --core-height $CORE_HEIGHT"
echo ""

nc_chipgen \
    --soc-config "$GEN_CONFIG" \
    --out         "$PROJECT_ROOT" \
    --pdk-root    "$PDK_ROOT" \
    --nc-lib-root "$NC_LIB_ROOT" \
    --core-width  $CORE_WIDTH \
    --core-height $CORE_HEIGHT 2>&1

RETCODE=$?
echo ""
echo "=== nc_chipgen exited with code: $RETCODE ==="
